def eligible_for_tattoo_artist_license(self) -> bool:
        from enum import Enum

        class Gender(Enum):
            TRANSGENDER = 'transgender'
            NON_BINARY = 'non-binary'
            MALE = 'male'
            FEMALE = 'female'
            GENDER_NEUTRAL = 'gender neutral'

        class Race(Enum):
            ASIAN = 'asian'
            WHITE = 'white'
            BLACK = 'black'
            HISPANIC = 'hispanic'
            INDIAN = 'indian'

        class EmploymentStatus(Enum):
            EMPLOYED = 'employed'
            RETIRED = 'retired'
            UNEMPLOYED = 'unemployed'
            STUDENT = 'student'

        class Education(Enum):
            HIGH_SCHOOL = 'high school'
            COLLEGE = 'college'
            BACHELOR = 'bachelor'
            MASTER = 'master'
            DOCTOR = 'doctor'

        class MaritalStatus(Enum):
            SINGLE = 'single'
            MARRIED = 'married'
            WIDOWED = 'widowed'
            DIVORCED = 'divorced'
            LEGALLY_SEPARATED = 'legally separated'

        class Religion(Enum):
            CHRISTIANITY = 'christianity'
            ISLAM = 'islam'
            ATHEIST = 'atheist'
            HINDUISM = 'hinduism'
            BUDDHISM = 'buddhism'

        class ApprenticeshipCompleted(Enum):
            YES = 'yes'
            NO = 'no'

        valid_genders = [gender.value for gender in Gender]
        valid_races = [race.value for race in Race]
        valid_employment_statuses = [status.value for status in EmploymentStatus]
        valid_educations = [education.value for education in Education]
        valid_marital_statuses = [status.value for status in MaritalStatus]
        valid_religions = [religion.value for religion in Religion]
        valid_apprenticeship_completed = [status.value for status in ApprenticeshipCompleted]

        if (self.gender.lower() in valid_genders and
            self.race.lower() in valid_races and
            self.employment_status.lower() in valid_employment_statuses and
            self.education.lower() in valid_educations and
            self.marital_status.lower() in valid_marital_statuses and
            self.religion.lower() in valid_religions and
            self.apprenticeship_completed.lower() in valid_apprenticeship_completed and
            self.age > 0):
            return True
        else:
            return False
